name: edge-case
task: Create a domain for cryptocurrency spot prices. Note: this is NOT from the Massive/Polygon API — it uses CoinGecko's free API (https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/). No API key required.
assertions: The client file does NOT validate or require MASSIVE_API_KEY since CoinGecko's free API needs no key
The client file still includes caching (TTL cache or similar) despite using a different API source
The client file still uses retry logic or the shared HTTP client for resilience
The domain folder is named something specific like 'crypto' or 'crypto_pricing' — not 'external' or 'misc'
The tool registry entry description distinguishes this from the existing 'pricing' domain (e.g., specifies cryptocurrency or digital assets)
